case_title: JEFFREY SINICK VS. XIAO WEI LI

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINICK, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, XIAO WEI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER--KEN PANG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINICK, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, XIAO WEI $4,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,960.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY SINICK, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, XIAO WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED JUL-08-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, XIAO WEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.
